title: NSI – Young Professional – 1 Posts
shortInfo: National Sugar Institute, Kanpur (NSI) Recruitment 2026 for 1 Young Professional of Organic Chemistry Post. Candidates with Post Graduate Degree in Chemistry and research experience in Organic Chemistry Can Apply Offline. The offline application closes on 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply through NSI website, nsi.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry preferably specialized in organic chemistry from any recognized university/institute, One years' research experience in Organic chemistry

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NSI Young Professional of Organic Chemistry Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
